name: sherpa-container
description: Pure wrapper container. Owns sizing variants, col/row span, and exposes a named container query scope (sherpa-container) for descendant viz components. Header, filters, and metrics are composed as light-DOM children.

data-variant.description: Layout variant — fit (hugs content), resizable (grid-driven spans), fill (fills parent)

data-col-span.description: Column span in the layout grid (resizable variant only)

data-row-span.description: Row span in the layout grid (resizable variant only)

data-editable.description: Edit mode — enables the resize grip (resizable variant only)

data-menu-open.description: Set automatically while a descendant overflow menu is open

slots.(default): Consumer composition — sherpa-container-header, sherpa-filter-bar, and viz components
